title: Upstart Announces $1B Forward-Flow Agreement with Eltura Ventures and Aperture Investors
text: Upstart announced a $1 billion forward-flow agreement with Eltura Capital Management and Aperture Investors to purchase consumer loans originated through the Upstart platform. This partnership represents a significant milestone in Upstart's capital raising strategy, securing over $4 billion in new committed capital in 2025. The forward-flow agreement demonstrates strong confidence from institutional capital providers in Upstart's AI lending platform and model performance. Additional partnerships include a 12-month forward-flow purchase agreement with funds managed by Wafra for up to $200 million of auto finance assets and a forward-flow agreement with Fortress Investment Group for up to $1.25 billion of consumer loans over 15 months. These committed capital partnerships have become critical to funding Upstart's rapid loan origination growth. The company's ability to secure diverse funding sources from institutional investors validates its market position and lending platform.
